extension.description: Browse movies and TV shows in TMDBHelper, pick a source from Usenet, and stream it directly in Kodi. NZB-DAV searches your NZBHydra2 indexers, downloads through nzbdav, and plays the file over WebDAV — no manual NZB handling required. Includes smart quality filtering, on-the-fly MP4 to MKV remuxing with subtitle support, and full seeking with a progress bar.

Browse movies and TV shows in TMDBHelper, pick a source from Usenet, and stream it directly in Kodi. NZB-DAV searches your NZBHydra2 indexers, downloads through nzbdav, and plays the file over WebDAV — no manual NZB handling required. Includes smart quality filtering, on-the-fly MP4 to MKV remuxing with subtitle support, and full seeking with a progress bar.
extension.disclaimer: Requires your own NZBHydra2 and nzbdav instances plus valid API/WebDAV access. No content is provided.
Requires your own NZBHydra2 and nzbdav instances plus valid API/WebDAV access. No content is provided.
extension.news:
v0.6.11 - Preserve full modal error dialog text where Kodi's Dialog API allows it - Show NZBHydra outages and invalid responses in modal dialogs - Keep duplicate NZB results visible instead of merging indexers
v0.6.10 - Show modal error dialog on every playback failure (replaces toast notifications) - Detect post-resolve stream crashes (missing articles, auth rejection) with error dialog - Clear playlist on stream failure to prevent TMDBHelper retry loop
v0.6.9 - Deduplicate identical NZBs from multiple indexers (same title+size), show "Multiple" as indexer - Send configured max results limit to NZBHydra2 API (was hardcoded to 100)
v0.6.8 - Fix playback failing due to URL-encoded '=' in auth header (Kodi pipe syntax) - Show download failures in a modal dialog instead of a toast notification - Clear video playlist on resolve failure to prevent Kodi retry loop
v0.6.7 - Fix pylint W0621: remove redundant import os in _serve_temp_faststart
v0.6.6 - Validate URL scheme in stream proxy to reject non-HTTP URLs - Redact API keys and auth credentials from debug logs - Reuse shared notification helper (remove duplicated logic) - Reduce _serve_remux complexity by extracting seek and faststart helpers - Localize "no video file found" notification string - Truncate server failure messages to 80 chars for TV UI - Fix all code scanning alerts (complexity, indentation, broad-except)
v0.6.5 - Show nzbdav failure reason to user when download fails - Notify user when download completes but no video file found on WebDAV - Show stream errors to user instead of silently swallowing them - Fix playback freeze caused by ffmpeg stderr pipe buffer filling up
v0.6.2 - Fix flaky cache eviction test due to non-deterministic file sizes
v0.6.1 - Fix remaining code scanning alerts (broad-except, locally-disabled)
v0.6.0 - Fix all code scanning alerts (complexity, broad-except, continuation) - Fix pylint warnings (nesting, unused import, consider-using-in)
v0.5.0 - Simplify settings: TMDBHelper-only install, remove WebDAV URL field - Release group multiselect dialogs with curated defaults - Fix continuation requests restarting ffmpeg from byte 0
v0.4.3 - Remux MP4 to MKV on the fly via ffmpeg (fixes 32-bit Kodi CFileCache bug) - Subtitle conversion (mov_text to SRT) with toggleable setting - Byte-range seeking with duration probe and progress bar - Background service for stream proxy and playback auto-recovery - Fix playback-failed dialog caused by setResolvedUrl
v0.4.1 - Address high/medium findings from code review
v0.4.0 - Show lightning bolt indicator for already-downloaded NZBs - Suppress BrokenPipeError log spam when stopping playback
v0.3.0 - WebDAV streaming on CoreELEC with MP4 faststart proxy - Skip re-downloading if NZB already completed in nzbdav history - Test Connection buttons for NZBHydra and nzbdav in settings - Retry NZB submission up to 3 times on transient failure - Show filter count and offer to show all when everything filtered - LRU cache eviction when cache exceeds 50MB limit - Use IMDB ID for TV show searches
v0.2.0 - Kodi localization support for addon UI and settings labels - Repository best-practice metadata and coverage tests
v0.1.0 - Initial release with NZBHydra2 search, nzbdav streaming, TMDBHelper integration - PTT-based quality filtering, custom results dialog, search caching
